<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<title>Protocol Fleet Register — Home Department, Government of Sikkim</title>
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Source+Serif+4:opsz,wght@8..60,400;8..60,600;8..60,700&family=IBM+Plex+Sans:wght@400;500;600&family=IBM+Plex+Mono:wght@400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root{
    --bg:#FAFAF8;
    --surface:#FFFFFF;
    --ink:#1C2B39;
    --ink-soft:#5B6B76;
    --accent:#8B1E24;
    --accent-soft:#F3E6E4;
    --line:#DDD9CE;
    --steel:#5B7B8C;
    --success:#2F6B4F;
    --success-soft:#E7F0EA;
    --warn:#9C6B14;
    --warn-soft:#FBF0DC;
  }
  *{box-sizing:border-box;}
  html,body{margin:0;padding:0;}
  body{
    background:var(--bg);
    color:var(--ink);
    font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif;
    font-size:14px;
    line-height:1.5;
  }
  h1,h2,h3{font-family:'Source Serif 4',serif;font-weight:600;margin:0;}
  .mono{font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;}
  .eyebrow{
    font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;
    font-size:11px;
    letter-spacing:.08em;
    text-transform:uppercase;
    color:var(--accent);
  }
  button{font-family:inherit;cursor:pointer;}
  input,select,textarea{font-family:inherit;font-size:14px;}

  /* ---- App shell ---- */
  #app{display:flex;min-height:100vh;}
  aside{
    width:220px;flex:none;
    background:var(--surface);
    border-right:1px solid var(--line);
    padding:24px 0;
    display:flex;flex-direction:column;
  }
  .brand{padding:0 20px 20px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);margin-bottom:12px;}
  .brand .eyebrow{margin-bottom:6px;}
  .brand h1{font-size:17px;line-height:1.25;}
  nav{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:2px;padding:8px 0;}
  nav button{
    all:unset;
    padding:10px 20px;
    font-size:13.5px;
    color:var(--ink-soft);
    border-left:3px solid transparent;
    cursor:pointer;
  }
  nav button:hover{color:var(--ink);background:var(--accent-soft);}
  nav button.active{color:var(--accent);border-left-color:var(--accent);font-weight:500;background:var(--accent-soft);}
  .seal{margin-top:auto;padding:18px 20px 4px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;color:var(--ink-soft);font-size:11px;}
  .seal svg{flex:none;}

  main{flex:1;padding:32px 40px;max-width:1200px;}
  .page-head{margin-bottom:24px;}
  .page-head h2{font-size:22px;}
  .page-head p{color:var(--ink-soft);margin-top:4px;font-size:13px;}

  .cards{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:14px;margin-bottom:28px;}
  .card{background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--line);padding:16px 18px;}
  .card .eyebrow{margin-bottom:8px;}
  .card .val{font-family:'Source Serif 4',serif;font-size:26px;font-weight:600;}
  .card .sub{color:var(--ink-soft);font-size:12px;margin-top:4px;}

  table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;background:var(--surface);}
  th,td{text-align:left;padding:9px 12px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);font-size:13px;}
  th{font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:10.5px;letter-spacing:.05em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--ink-soft);font-weight:500;background:#FBFAF7;}
  tbody tr:hover{background:var(--accent-soft);}
  .table-wrap{border:1px solid var(--line);margin-bottom:24px;overflow-x:auto;}

  .badge{display:inline-block;padding:2px 8px;font-size:11px;font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;border:1px solid transparent;}
  .badge.free{background:var(--success-soft);color:var(--success);border-color:#CADBCF;}
  .badge.busy{background:var(--warn-soft);color:var(--warn);border-color:#E7D6AE;}
  .badge.guest{background:#EEF1F4;color:var(--steel);border-color:var(--line);}
  .badge.hire{background:var(--accent-soft);color:var(--accent);border-color:#E3C9C7;}

  .panel{background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--line);padding:22px;margin-bottom:20px;}
  .panel h3{font-size:15px;margin-bottom:14px;padding-bottom:10px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);}
  .grid2{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:16px;}
  .field{margin-bottom:14px;}
  .field label{display:block;font-size:11.5px;color:var(--ink-soft);margin-bottom:5px;font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;letter-spacing:.02em;}
  .field input,.field select,.field textarea{
    width:100%;padding:8px 10px;border:1px solid var(--line);background:var(--bg);color:var(--ink);
  }
  .field input:focus,.field select:focus,.field textarea:focus{outline:2px solid var(--steel);outline-offset:-1px;}
  .radio-row{display:flex;gap:10px;flex-wrap:wrap;}
  .radio-opt{border:1px solid var(--line);padding:9px 12px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;cursor:pointer;font-size:13px;background:var(--bg);}
  .radio-opt.checked{border-color:var(--accent);background:var(--accent-soft);}

  .summary-line{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;padding:6px 0;font-size:13px;border-bottom:1px dashed var(--line);}
  .summary-line:last-child{border:none;font-weight:600;font-size:15px;padding-top:10px;}
  .summary-line .lbl{color:var(--ink-soft);}

  .btn{
    border:1px solid var(--accent);background:var(--accent);color:#fff;
    padding:10px 20px;font-size:13.5px;font-weight:500;
  }
  .btn:hover{background:#71171C;}
  .btn.ghost{background:transparent;color:var(--accent);}
  .btn.ghost:hover{background:var(--accent-soft);}
  .btn.small{padding:5px 10px;font-size:12px;}
  .btn:disabled{opacity:.4;cursor:not-allowed;}

  .warning-box{background:var(--warn-soft);border:1px solid #E7D6AE;color:var(--warn);padding:10px 12px;font-size:12.5px;margin-bottom:14px;}

  .empty{color:var(--ink-soft);font-size:13px;padding:24px;text-align:center;}

  /* ---- Calendar ---- */
  .cal-head{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:16px;}
  .cal-head h3{font-size:16px;}
  .cal-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(7,1fr);}
  .cal-dow{padding:8px;font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:10.5px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.05em;color:var(--ink-soft);text-align:center;background:#FBFAF7;border:1px solid var(--line);}
  .cal-cell{min-height:96px;border:1px solid var(--line);padding:6px;background:var(--surface);cursor:pointer;transition:background .1s;}
  .cal-cell:hover{background:var(--accent-soft);}
  .cal-cell.other-month{background:#FBFAF7;color:var(--ink-soft);opacity:.5;}
  .cal-cell.today{box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 2px var(--steel);}
  .cal-daynum{font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:11px;color:var(--ink-soft);margin-bottom:5px;}
  .cal-pill{font-size:10px;padding:2px 5px;margin-bottom:2px;cursor:pointer;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;}
  .cal-pill.hire{background:var(--accent-soft);color:var(--accent);}
  .cal-pill.guest{background:#EEF1F4;color:var(--steel);}
  .cal-legend{display:flex;gap:18px;margin-top:14px;font-size:12px;color:var(--ink-soft);align-items:center;}
  .cal-legend .dot{width:10px;height:10px;display:inline-block;margin-right:6px;vertical-align:-1px;}

  /* ---- Modal / printable letter & report ---- */
  .modal-back{position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(28,43,57,.55);display:flex;align-items:flex-start;justify-content:center;padding:40px 20px;overflow:auto;z-index:50;}
  .modal-back.hidden{display:none;}
  .modal{background:#fff;width:720px;max-width:100%;padding:0;box-shadow:0 10px 40px rgba(0,0,0,.25);}
  .modal-toolbar{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;padding:12px 20px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);background:#FBFAF7;}
  .modal-toolbar .eyebrow{color:var(--ink-soft);}
  .modal-toolbar .actions{display:flex;gap:8px;}
  .modal-toolbar button.icon{all:unset;cursor:pointer;padding:6px 10px;color:var(--ink-soft);font-size:18px;}

  .letterhead{padding:44px 50px;}
  .lh-top{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:16px;border-bottom:2px solid var(--ink);padding-bottom:16px;margin-bottom:22px;}
  .lh-top h2{font-size:18px;letter-spacing:.03em;}
  .lh-top .sub{font-size:12px;color:var(--ink-soft);margin-top:2px;}
  .lh-meta{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:12px;margin-bottom:20px;color:var(--ink-soft);}
  .lh-body p{margin:0 0 12px;font-size:13.5px;line-height:1.7;}
  .lh-facts{border:1px solid var(--line);margin:16px 0;}
  .lh-facts div{display:flex;border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);}
  .lh-facts div:last-child{border-bottom:none;}
  .lh-facts span{padding:8px 12px;font-size:12.5px;}
  .lh-facts span:first-child{width:170px;flex:none;color:var(--ink-soft);font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:11px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.04em;background:#FBFAF7;border-right:1px solid var(--line);}
  .lh-sign{margin-top:44px;font-size:13px;}
  .lh-sign .line{margin-top:36px;border-top:1px solid var(--ink);width:220px;padding-top:6px;}

  .report-doc{padding:36px 40px;}
  .report-doc h3{font-size:16px;margin-bottom:2px;}
  .report-doc .sub{color:var(--ink-soft);font-size:12px;margin-bottom:18px;}
  .report-doc table{font-size:12.5px;}

  @media print{
    body *{visibility:hidden;}
    #printable, #printable *{visibility:visible;}
    #printable{position:absolute;top:0;left:0;width:100%;}
    .modal-toolbar{display:none;}
  }

  @media (max-width:860px){
    #app{flex-direction:column;}
    aside{width:100%;flex-direction:row;overflow-x:auto;padding:12px;align-items:center;}
    .brand{border:none;padding:0 14px 0 0;margin:0;}
    nav{flex-direction:row;padding:0;}
    .seal{display:none;}
    main{padding:20px;}
    .cards{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;}
    .grid2{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<script>const EMBLEM_PNG_B64 = "";
const SEAL_PNG_B64 = "";
const TEMPLATE_DOCX_B64 = "";</script>
<div id="app">
  <aside>
    <div class="brand">
      <div class="eyebrow">Govt. of Sikkim · Home Dept.</div>
      <h1>Protocol Fleet<br>Register</h1>
    </div>
    <nav id="nav">
      <button data-view="dashboard" class="active">Dashboard</button>
      <button data-view="booking">New Booking</button>
      <button data-view="calendar">Calendar</button>
      <button data-view="bookings">Bookings Log</button>
      <button data-view="fleet">Fleet &amp; Drivers</button>
      <button data-view="reports">Reports</button>
    </nav>
    <div class="seal">
      <svg width="26" height="26" viewBox="0 0 26 26"><circle cx="13" cy="13" r="12" fill="none" stroke="#5B6B76" stroke-width="1"/><circle cx="13" cy="13" r="8.5" fill="none" stroke="#5B6B76" stroke-width="1"/><text x="13" y="16.5" text-anchor="middle" font-family="IBM Plex Mono" font-size="7" fill="#5B6B76">GoS</text></svg>
      <span>Mechanical Section</span>
    </div>
  </aside>

  <main id="main"></main>
</div>

<div class="modal-back hidden" id="modalBack">
  <div class="modal">
    <div class="modal-toolbar">
      <span class="eyebrow" id="modalLabel">Document</span>
      <div class="actions">
        <button class="btn small" id="downloadDocxBtn">Download Word (.docx)</button>
        <button class="btn small" id="downloadPdfBtn">Download PDF (.pdf)</button>
        <button class="icon" onclick="closeModal()">&times;</button>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div id="printable"></div>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
/* ---------------------------------------------------------------
   Protocol Fleet Register — data layer
--------------------------------------------------------------- */
const RATE = 1700;
const FLEET_VERSION = 2;
let DB = null;
const uid = () => Math.random().toString(36).slice(2,9);

function seedFleet(){
  return {
    drivers: [
      {id:'d1', name:'Palden Tshering Lepcha', phone:'62943 67199'},
      {id:'d2', name:'Sonam Gylapo Bhutia', phone:'95932 7850'},
      {id:'d3', name:'Passang Tamang', phone:'94346 32411'},
      {id:'d4', name:'Binod Pradhan I', phone:'78728 94642'},
      {id:'d5', name:'Binod Pradhan II', phone:'94746 62386'},
      {id:'d6', name:'Suman Tamang', phone:'98323 21297'},
      {id:'d7', name:'Narendra Chettri', phone:'97330 40037'},
      {id:'d8', name:'Sonam Dorjee Tamang', phone:'79081 79416'},
      {id:'d9', name:'Tenzing Norbu Bhutia', phone:'97331 21044'},
      {id:'d10', name:'Ashok Manger', phone:'97342 27864'},
      {id:'d11', name:'Tshering Sherpa', phone:'97758 41321'},
      {id:'d12', name:'Devraj Gadaily', phone:'97340 56292'},
      {id:'d13', name:'Krishna Pradhan', phone:'90839 26954'},
      {id:'d14', name:'Tika Gurung', phone:'95933 82850'},
      {id:'d15', name:'Y.N. Sharma', phone:'86957 09002'}
    ],
    vehicles: [
      {id:'v1', regNo:'SK 01 GB 0045', model:'Fortuner', type:'SUV', driverId:'d1'},
      {id:'v2', regNo:'SK 01 GB 0046', model:'Bullet Proof Scorpio', type:'SUV — Bullet Resistant', driverId:'d1'},
      {id:'v3', regNo:'SK 01 G 4383', model:'Innova', type:'MPV', driverId:'d1'},
      {id:'v4', regNo:'SK 01 GB 0034', model:'Camry', type:'Sedan', driverId:'d2'},
      {id:'v5', regNo:'SK 01 GC 0010', model:'Cherokee', type:'SUV', driverId:'d2'},
      {id:'v6', regNo:'SK 01 G 4571', model:'Fortuner', type:'SUV', driverId:'d2'},
      {id:'v7', regNo:'SK 01 G 2382', model:'Innova', type:'MPV', driverId:'d2'},
      {id:'v8', regNo:'SK 01 G 0128', model:'Fortuner', type:'SUV', driverId:'d3'},
      {id:'v9', regNo:'SK 01 G 4296', model:'Innova', type:'MPV', driverId:'d3'},
      {id:'v10', regNo:'SK 01 GA 0084', model:'Innova', type:'MPV', driverId:'d3'},
      {id:'v11', regNo:'SK 01 G 3211', model:'Fortuner', type:'SUV', driverId:'d4'},
      {id:'v12', regNo:'SK 01 G 4026', model:'XUV 700', type:'SUV', driverId:'d4'},
      {id:'v13', regNo:'SK 01 G 4390', model:'Innova', type:'MPV', driverId:'d4'},
      {id:'v14', regNo:'SK 01 G 4602', model:'Fortuner', type:'SUV', driverId:'d5'},
      {id:'v15', regNo:'SK 01 G 4023', model:'XUV 700', type:'SUV', driverId:'d5'},
      {id:'v16', regNo:'SK 01 G 3367', model:'Innova', type:'MPV', driverId:'d5'},
      {id:'v17', regNo:'SK 01 G 4153', model:'Fortuner', type:'SUV', driverId:'d6'},
      {id:'v18', regNo:'SK 01 G 4571', model:'Innova', type:'MPV', driverId:'d6'},
      {id:'v19', regNo:'SK 01 G 3124', model:'Fortuner', type:'SUV', driverId:'d6'},
      {id:'v20', regNo:'SK 01 G 3212', model:'Fortuner', type:'SUV', driverId:'d7'},
      {id:'v21', regNo:'SK 01 G 0061', model:'Innova', type:'MPV', driverId:'d7'},
      {id:'v22', regNo:'SK 01 G 4222', model:'Fortuner', type:'SUV', driverId:'d7'},
      {id:'v23', regNo:'SK 01 G 3879', model:'Fortuner', type:'SUV', driverId:'d8'},
      {id:'v24', regNo:'SK 01 G 4260', model:'Innova', type:'MPV', driverId:'d8'},
      {id:'v25', regNo:'SK 01 G 4295', model:'Innova', type:'MPV', driverId:'d8'},
      {id:'v26', regNo:'SK 01 G 3368', model:'Innova', type:'MPV', driverId:'d8'},
      {id:'v27', regNo:'SK 01 G 4204', model:'Fortuner', type:'SUV', driverId:'d9'},
      {id:'v28', regNo:'SK 01 G 4211', model:'Innova', type:'MPV', driverId:'d9'},
      {id:'v29', regNo:'SK 01 G 2660', model:'Innova', type:'MPV', driverId:'d9'},
      {id:'v30', regNo:'SK 01 G 0096', model:'Innova', type:'MPV', driverId:'d10'},
      {id:'v31', regNo:'SK 01 G 3210', model:'Fortuner', type:'SUV', driverId:'d10'},
      {id:'v32', regNo:'SK 01 G 4185', model:'Fortuner', type:'SUV', driverId:'d10'},
      {id:'v33', regNo:'SK 01 G 4625', model:'Fortuner', type:'SUV', driverId:'d11'},
      {id:'v34', regNo:'SK 01 G 4655', model:'Innova', type:'MPV', driverId:'d11'},
      {id:'v35', regNo:'SK 01 G 3521', model:'Innova', type:'MPV', driverId:'d11'},
      {id:'v36', regNo:'SK 01 GA 0098', model:'Innova', type:'MPV', driverId:'d12'},
      {id:'v37', regNo:'SK 01 G 4389', model:'Innova', type:'MPV', driverId:'d12'},
      {id:'v38', regNo:'SK 01 G 0004', model:'Scorpio-N', type:'SUV', driverId:'d12'},
      {id:'v39', regNo:'SK 01 G 3162', model:'Fortuner', type:'SUV', driverId:'d13'},
      {id:'v40', regNo:'SK 01 G 4210', model:'Innova', type:'MPV', driverId:'d13'},
      {id:'v41', regNo:'SK 01 G 3213', model:'Fortuner', type:'SUV', driverId:'d14'},
      {id:'v42', regNo:'SK 01 G 4310', model:'Innova', type:'MPV', driverId:'d14'},
      {id:'v43', regNo:'SK 01 G 4290', model:'Innova', type:'MPV', driverId:'d14'},
      {id:'v44', regNo:'SK 01 G 0029', model:'Innova', type:'MPV', driverId:'d15'},
      {id:'v45', regNo:'SK 01 G 0080', model:'Jeep Compass', type:'SUV', driverId:'d15'}
    ]
  };
}

function seedDB(){
  const fleet = seedFleet();
  return { fleetVersion: FLEET_VERSION, letterSeq: 0, vehicles: fleet.vehicles, drivers: fleet.drivers, bookings: [] };
}

async function loadDB(){
  let db;
  try{
    const res = await window.storage.get('protocol-fleet-db', false);
    db = res && res.value ? JSON.parse(res.value) : null;
  }catch(e){ db = null; }

  if(!db){
    db = seedDB();
    await saveDB(db);
    return db;
  }
  if(db.fleetVersion !== FLEET_VERSION){
    const fleet = seedFleet();
    db.vehicles = fleet.vehicles;
    db.drivers = fleet.drivers;
    db.fleetVersion = FLEET_VERSION;
    await saveDB(db);
  }
  return db;
}
async function saveDB(db){
  try{
    await window.storage.set('protocol-fleet-db', JSON.stringify(db), false);
  }catch(e){ console.error('Storage error', e); }
}

/* ---------------------------------------------------------------
   Helpers
--------------------------------------------------------------- */
function fmtDate(d){
  const dt = new Date(d+'T00:00:00');
  return dt.toLocaleDateString('en-IN',{day:'2-digit',month:'long',year:'numeric'});
}
function fmtShort(d){
  const dt = new Date(d+'T00:00:00');
  return dt.toLocaleDateString('en-IN',{day:'2-digit',month:'short',year:'numeric'});
}
function inr(n){ return '₹' + Number(n).toLocaleString('en-IN'); }
function fiscalYearLabel(dateStr){
  const d = new Date(dateStr+'T00:00:00');
  const y = d.getFullYear();
  const fyStart = (d.getMonth()+1) >= 4 ? y : y-1;
  return `${String(fyStart).slice(-2)}-${String(fyStart+1).slice(-2)}`;
}
function numberToWordsIndian(num){
  if(num===0) return 'Zero';
  const ones = ['','One','Two','Three','Four','Five','Six','Seven','Eight','Nine','Ten','Eleven','Twelve','Thirteen','Fourteen','Fifteen','Sixteen','Seventeen','Eighteen','Nineteen'];
  const tens = ['','','Twenty','Thirty','Forty','Fifty','Sixty','Seventy','Eighty','Ninety'];
  function twoDigit(n){ return n<20 ? ones[n] : tens[Math.floor(n/10)] + (n%10 ? ' '+ones[n%10] : ''); }
  function threeDigit(n){
    let str='';
    if(n>=100){ str += ones[Math.floor(n/100)] + ' Hundred'; n%=100; if(n) str+=' '; }
    if(n) str += twoDigit(n);
    return str;
  }
  let n = num;
  const crore = Math.floor(n/10000000); n%=10000000;
  const lakh = Math.floor(n/100000); n%=100000;
  const thousand = Math.floor(n/1000); n%=1000;
  const rest = n;
  const parts = [];
  if(crore) parts.push(threeDigit(crore)+' Crore');
  if(lakh) parts.push(threeDigit(lakh)+' Lakh');
  if(thousand) parts.push(threeDigit(thousand)+' Thousand');
  if(rest) parts.push(threeDigit(rest));
  return parts.join(' ') || 'Zero';
}
function inrWords(n){ return numberToWordsIndian(Math.round(n)) + ' Only'; }
function rsPlain(n){ return 'Rs. ' + Number(n).toLocaleString('en-IN'); }
function escapeXml(s){
  return String(s == null ? '' : s).replace(/[<>&"']/g, ch => (
    {'<':'&lt;','>':'&gt;','&':'&amp;','"':'&quot;',"'":'&apos;'}[ch]
  ));
}
function daysBetween(a,b){
  const d = (new Date(b+'T00:00:00') - new Date(a+'T00:00:00')) / 86400000;
  return Math.max(1, Math.round(d) + 1);
}
function todayISO(){ return new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10); }
function isOnDutyToday(vehicleId){
  const t = todayISO();
  return DB.bookings.some(b => b.vehicleId===vehicleId && b.dateFrom<=t && b.dateTo>=t);
}
function overlaps(aFrom,aTo,bFrom,bTo){ return aFrom<=bTo && bFrom<=aTo; }

/* ---------------------------------------------------------------
   Nav / routing
--------------------------------------------------------------- */
document.getElementById('nav').addEventListener('click', e=>{
  const btn = e.target.closest('button[data-view]');
  if(!btn) return;
  document.querySelectorAll('#nav button').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('active'));
  btn.classList.add('active');
  render(btn.dataset.view);
});

function render(view){
  const main = document.getElementById('main');
  if(view==='dashboard') return renderDashboard(main);
  if(view==='booking') return renderBookingForm(main);
  if(view==='calendar') return renderCalendar(main);
  if(view==='bookings') return renderBookingsLog(main);
  if(view==='fleet') return renderFleet(main);
  if(view==='reports') return renderReports(main);
}

/* ---------------------------------------------------------------
   Dashboard
--------------------------------------------------------------- */
function renderDashboard(main){
  const b = DB.bookings;
  const revenue = b.filter(x=>x.category==='hire').reduce((s,x)=>s+x.amount,0);
  const vDays = b.reduce((s,x)=>s+x.days,0);
  const guestCount = b.filter(x=>x.category!=='hire').length;
  const onDuty = DB.vehicles.filter(v=>isOnDutyToday(v.id)).length;

  main.innerHTML = `
    <div class="page-head">
      <h2>Dashboard</h2>
      <p>Overview of the Protocol Fleet as on ${fmtDate(todayISO())}.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="cards">
      <div class="card"><div class="eyebrow">Total Bookings</div><div class="val">${b.length}</div><div class="sub">${guestCount} on guest basis</div></div>
      <div class="card"><div class="eyebrow">Revenue Generated</div><div class="val">${inr(revenue)}</div><div class="sub">@ ${inr(RATE)}/day, hire bookings only</div></div>
      <div class="card"><div class="eyebrow">Vehicle-Days Deployed</div><div class="val">${vDays}</div><div class="sub">across ${DB.vehicles.length} vehicles</div></div>
      <div class="card"><div class="eyebrow">On Duty Today</div><div class="val">${onDuty} / ${DB.vehicles.length}</div><div class="sub">${DB.vehicles.length-onDuty} available now</div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="table-wrap">
      <table>
        <thead><tr><th>Letter No.</th><th>Department</th><th>Vehicle</th><th>Dates</th><th>Category</th><th>Amount</th></tr></thead>
        <tbody>
          ${b.slice().reverse().slice(0,6).map(rowDash).join('') || `<tr><td colspan="6" class="empty">No bookings recorded yet — start with “New Booking”.</td></tr>`}
        </tbody>
      </table>
    </div>
  `;
}
function rowDash(bk){
  const v = DB.vehicles.find(x=>x.id===bk.vehicleId);
  return `<tr>
    <td class="mono">${bk.letterNo || '—'}</td>
    <td>${bk.department}</td>
    <td>${v ? v.regNo : '—'}</td>
    <td>${fmtShort(bk.dateFrom)} – ${fmtShort(bk.dateTo)}</td>
    <td>${categoryBadge(bk.category)}</td>
    <td>${bk.category==='hire' ? inr(bk.amount) : '—'}</td>
  </tr>`;
}
function categoryBadge(cat){
  if(cat==='hire') return `<span class="badge hire">Hire</span>`;
  if(cat==='home_guest') return `<span class="badge guest">Home Dept. Guest</span>`;
  return `<span class="badge guest">State Guest</span>`;
}

/* ---------------------------------------------------------------
   Calendar
--------------------------------------------------------------- */
let calMonth = new Date();
let prefillDate = null;

function goToBookingWithDate(iso){
  prefillDate = iso;
  document.querySelectorAll('#nav button').forEach(b=>b.classList.toggle('active', b.dataset.view==='booking'));
  render('booking');
}

function renderCalendar(main){
  const year = calMonth.getFullYear();
  const month = calMonth.getMonth();
  const firstDay = new Date(year, month, 1);
  const startWeekday = firstDay.getDay();
  const daysInMonth = new Date(year, month+1, 0).getDate();
  const daysInPrevMonth = new Date(year, month, 0).getDate();
  const monthLabel = firstDay.toLocaleDateString('en-IN',{month:'long', year:'numeric'});
  const dow = ['Sun','Mon','Tue','Wed','Thu','Fri','Sat'];
  const todayStr = todayISO();

  const cells = [];
  for(let i=startWeekday-1;i>=0;i--){
    cells.push({date: new Date(year, month-1, daysInPrevMonth - i), inMonth:false});
  }
  for(let d=1; d<=daysInMonth; d++){
    cells.push({date: new Date(year, month, d), inMonth:true});
  }
  while(cells.length % 7 !== 0){
    const last = cells[cells.length-1].date;
    const next = new Date(last); next.setDate(next.getDate()+1);
    cells.push({date: next, inMonth:false});
  }

  main.innerHTML = `
    <div class="page-head"><h2>Calendar</h2><p>Monthly view of Protocol Fleet occupancy — click any date to start a booking there.</p></div>
    <div class="cal-head">
      <button class="btn small ghost" id="prevMonth">&larr; Previous</button>
      <h3>${monthLabel}</h3>
      <button class="btn small ghost" id="nextMonth">Next &rarr;</button>
    </div>
    <div class="cal-grid">
      ${dow.map(d=>`<div class="cal-dow">${d}</div>`).join('')}
      ${cells.map(c=>{
        const iso = c.date.toISOString().slice(0,10);
        const bks = DB.bookings.filter(b=> b.dateFrom<=iso && b.dateTo>=iso);
        const shown = bks.slice(0,3).map(b=>{
          const v = DB.vehicles.find(x=>x.id===b.vehicleId);
          const cls = b.category==='hire' ? 'hire' : 'guest';
          return `<div class="cal-pill ${cls}" title="${b.department} — ${v?v.regNo:''}" onclick="event.stopPropagation(); reopenLetter('${b.id}')">${v?v.regNo:'—'}</div>`;
        }).join('');
        const more = bks.length>3 ? `<div class="cal-pill guest">+${bks.length-3} more</div>` : '';
        return `<div class="cal-cell ${c.inMonth?'':'other-month'} ${iso===todayStr?'today':''}" onclick="goToBookingWithDate('${iso}')">
          <div class="cal-daynum">${c.date.getDate()}</div>
          ${shown}${more}
        </div>`;
      }).join('')}
    </div>
    <div class="cal-legend">
      <span><span class="dot" style="background:var(--accent)"></span>Hire basis</span>
      <span><span class="dot" style="background:var(--steel)"></span>Guest (no charge)</span>
    </div>
  `;
  document.getElementById('prevMonth').addEventListener('click', ()=>{ calMonth.setMonth(calMonth.getMonth()-1); renderCalendar(main); });
  document.getElementById('nextMonth').addEventListener('click', ()=>{ calMonth.setMonth(calMonth.getMonth()+1); renderCalendar(main); });
}

/* ---------------------------------------------------------------
   New Booking
--------------------------------------------------------------- */
function renderBookingForm(main){
  const availableVehicles = DB.vehicles;
  const initDate = prefillDate || todayISO();
  prefillDate = null;
  main.innerHTML = `
    <div class="page-head">
      <h2>New Booking</h2>
      <p>Requisition a vehicle from the Protocol Fleet. A forwarding letter is generated automatically for hire-basis bookings.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="grid2">
      <div>
        <div class="panel">
          <h3>Requisition Details</h3>
          <div class="field"><label>Requesting Department</label>
            <input type="text" id="f_dept" placeholder="e.g. Forest, Environment &amp; Wildlife Management Department">
          </div>
          <div class="field"><label>Requesting Officer / Designation</label><input id="f_officer" placeholder="e.g. Shri A. Pradhan, Under Secretary"></div>
          <div class="field"><label>Purpose / Duty Assigned</label><textarea id="f_purpose" rows="2" placeholder="e.g. duty of Shri X, Hon'ble Minister, on tour to North Sikkim"></textarea></div>
          <div class="grid2">
            <div class="field"><label>Their Letter No. <span style="text-transform:none;color:var(--ink-soft)">(optional)</span></label><input id="f_refno" placeholder="e.g. PS/EM/2026/SPL17"></div>
            <div class="field"><label>Their Letter Date <span style="text-transform:none;color:var(--ink-soft)">(optional)</span></label><input type="date" id="f_refdate"></div>
          </div>
          <div class="field">
            <label>Category</label>
            <div class="radio-row" id="catRow">
              <label class="radio-opt checked"><input type="radio" name="cat" value="hire" checked style="margin:0"> Hire basis</label>
              <label class="radio-opt"><input type="radio" name="cat" value="home_guest" style="margin:0"> Home Dept. guest</label>
              <label class="radio-opt"><input type="radio" name="cat" value="state_guest" style="margin:0"> State guest</label>
            </div>
            <p id="letterHint" style="color:var(--ink-soft);font-size:11.5px;margin:6px 0 0;"></p>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="panel">
          <h3>Vehicles &amp; Drivers</h3>
          <p style="color:var(--ink-soft);font-size:12px;margin:-4px 0 14px;">Add a row for each vehicle required. A vehicle can be requisitioned without a driver where the receiving department will self-drive.</p>
          <div id="vehicleRows"></div>
          <button class="btn small ghost" id="addRowBtn" type="button">+ Add another vehicle</button>
          <div id="conflictWarning"></div>
          <div class="grid2" style="margin-top:14px">
            <div class="field"><label>From Date</label><input type="date" id="f_from" value="${initDate}"></div>
            <div class="field"><label>To Date</label><input type="date" id="f_to" value="${initDate}"></div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div>
        <div class="panel">
          <h3>Charge Summary</h3>
          <div class="summary-line"><span class="lbl">Duration</span><span id="s_days">1 day</span></div>
          <div class="summary-line"><span class="lbl">Vehicles Requisitioned</span><span id="s_count">1</span></div>
          <div class="summary-line"><span class="lbl">Rate</span><span id="s_rate">${inr(RATE)} / day / vehicle</span></div>
          <div class="summary-line"><span class="lbl">Total Payable</span><span id="s_total">${inr(RATE)}</span></div>
        </div>
        <button class="btn" id="submitBtn" style="width:100%">Confirm Booking</button>
      </div>
    </div>
  `;

  const rowsWrap = document.getElementById('vehicleRows');
  function vehicleOptions(){
    return availableVehicles.map(v=>`<option value="${v.id}">${v.regNo} — ${v.model} (${v.type})</option>`).join('');
  }
  function driverOptions(){
    return `<option value="">— No Driver / Self-Driven —</option>` +
      DB.drivers.map(d=>`<option value="${d.id}">${d.name} — ${d.phone}</option>`).join('');
  }
  function addRow(){
    const row = document.createElement('div');
    row.className = 'veh-row';
    row.style.cssText = 'display:flex;gap:8px;align-items:flex-end;margin-bottom:10px;';
    row.innerHTML = `
      <div class="field" style="flex:1;margin-bottom:0;"><label>Vehicle</label><select class="row-vehicle">${vehicleOptions()}</select></div>
      <div class="field" style="flex:1;margin-bottom:0;"><label>Driver</label><select class="row-driver">${driverOptions()}</select></div>
      <button class="btn small ghost row-remove" type="button" title="Remove this vehicle" style="margin-bottom:1px;">&times;</button>
    `;
    rowsWrap.appendChild(row);
    const vSel = row.querySelector('.row-vehicle');
    const dSel = row.querySelector('.row-driver');
    const firstVehicle = availableVehicles.find(v=>v.id===vSel.value);
    if(firstVehicle && firstVehicle.driverId) dSel.value = firstVehicle.driverId;
    vSel.addEventListener('change', ()=>{
      const v = DB.vehicles.find(x=>x.id===vSel.value);
      if(v && v.driverId) dSel.value = v.driverId;
      updateSummary();
    });
    dSel.addEventListener('change', updateSummary);
    row.querySelector('.row-remove').addEventListener('click', ()=>{
      if(rowsWrap.children.length <= 1) return;
      row.remove();
      updateSummary();
    });
    updateSummary();
  }
  document.getElementById('addRowBtn').addEventListener('click', addRow);
  addRow();

  document.querySelectorAll('#catRow .radio-opt').forEach(opt=>{
    opt.addEventListener('click',()=>{
      document.querySelectorAll('#catRow .radio-opt').forEach(o=>o.classList.remove('checked'));
      opt.classList.add('checked');
      opt.querySelector('input').checked = true;
      updateSummary();
      updateLetterHint();
    });
  });
  ['f_from','f_to'].forEach(id=>{
    document.getElementById(id).addEventListener('change', updateSummary);
  });
  updateSummary();
  updateLetterHint();

  function updateLetterHint(){
    const cat = document.querySelector('input[name=cat]:checked').value;
    document.getElementById('letterHint').textContent = cat==='hire'
      ? 'A hire-charge forwarding letter will be generated automatically on confirmation.'
      : 'No forwarding letter is required for guest bookings — this will simply be logged.';
  }

  function updateSummary(){
    const from = document.getElementById('f_from').value;
    const to = document.getElementById('f_to').value;
    const cat = document.querySelector('input[name=cat]:checked').value;
    const rowCount = rowsWrap.children.length;
    let days = 1;
    if(from && to && to>=from) days = daysBetween(from,to);
    const total = cat==='hire' ? days*RATE*rowCount : 0;
    document.getElementById('s_days').textContent = `${days} day${days>1?'s':''}`;
    document.getElementById('s_count').textContent = `${rowCount} vehicle${rowCount>1?'s':''}`;
    document.getElementById('s_total').textContent = cat==='hire' ? inr(total) : 'Nil — guest booking';

    const vehicleIds = Array.from(rowsWrap.querySelectorAll('.row-vehicle')).map(s=>s.value);
    const conflicts = [];
    vehicleIds.forEach(vid=>{
      const clash = DB.bookings.some(b=> b.vehicleId===vid && overlaps(from,to,b.dateFrom,b.dateTo));
      if(clash){ const v = DB.vehicles.find(x=>x.id===vid); conflicts.push(v ? v.regNo : vid); }
    });
    const dupes = vehicleIds.filter((v,i)=>vehicleIds.indexOf(v)!==i);
    let warn = '';
    if(conflicts.length) warn += `<div class="warning-box">These vehicles already have a booking overlapping these dates: ${[...new Set(conflicts)].join(', ')}. Confirming will double-book them — verify before proceeding.</div>`;
    if(dupes.length) warn += `<div class="warning-box">The same vehicle has been selected in more than one row. Remove the duplicate before confirming.</div>`;
    document.getElementById('conflictWarning').innerHTML = warn;
  }

  document.getElementById('submitBtn').addEventListener('click', async ()=>{
    const dept = document.getElementById('f_dept').value.trim();
    const officer = document.getElementById('f_officer').value.trim();
    const purpose = document.getElementById('f_purpose').value.trim();
    const refNo = document.getElementById('f_refno').value.trim();
    const refDate = document.getElementById('f_refdate').value;
    const cat = document.querySelector('input[name=cat]:checked').value;
    const from = document.getElementById('f_from').value;
    const to = document.getElementById('f_to').value;
    const rows = Array.from(rowsWrap.querySelectorAll('.veh-row')).map(r=>({
      vehicleId: r.querySelector('.row-vehicle').value,
      driverId: r.querySelector('.row-driver').value || null
    }));
    const vehicleIds = rows.map(r=>r.vehicleId);
    const hasDupes = vehicleIds.some((v,i)=>vehicleIds.indexOf(v)!==i);

    if(!dept || !officer || !purpose || !from || !to || to<from){
      alert('Please complete all fields — the To Date must not be earlier than the From Date.');
      return;
    }
    if(hasDupes){
      alert('The same vehicle appears in more than one row. Please remove the duplicate before confirming.');
      return;
    }
    const days = daysBetween(from,to);
    const isHire = cat==='hire';
    let letterNo = null;
    if(isHire){
      DB.letterSeq += 1;
      letterNo = `${DB.letterSeq}/H/P/${fiscalYearLabel(from)}`;
    }
    const groupId = uid();
    const createdAt = new Date().toISOString();
    rows.forEach(r=>{
      DB.bookings.push({
        id: uid(), groupId, letterNo,
        department: dept, officer, purpose, refNo, refDate, category: cat,
        vehicleId: r.vehicleId, driverId: r.driverId, dateFrom: from, dateTo: to,
        days, rate: RATE, amount: isHire ? days*RATE : 0,
        createdAt
      });
    });
    await saveDB(DB);
    if(isHire){
      openLetterGroup(groupId);
    }else{
      alert('Booking recorded on a guest basis — no forwarding letter is required.');
    }
    render('dashboard');
    document.querySelectorAll('#nav button').forEach(b=>b.classList.toggle('active', b.dataset.view==='dashboard'));
  });
}

/* ---------------------------------------------------------------
   Bookings Log
--------------------------------------------------------------- */
function renderBookingsLog(main){
  const rows = DB.bookings.slice().reverse().map(bk=>{
    const v = DB.vehicles.find(x=>x.id===bk.vehicleId);
    const d = DB.drivers.find(x=>x.id===bk.driverId);
    return `<tr>
      <td class="mono">${bk.letterNo || '—'}</td>
      <td>${bk.department}</td>
      <td>${v?v.regNo:'—'}</td>
      <td>${d?d.name:'—'}</td>
      <td>${fmtShort(bk.dateFrom)} – ${fmtShort(bk.dateTo)}</td>
      <td>${bk.days}</td>
      <td>${categoryBadge(bk.category)}</td>
      <td>${bk.category==='hire'?inr(bk.amount):'—'}</td>
      <td>${bk.letterNo ? `<button class="btn small ghost" onclick="reopenLetter('${bk.id}')">View Letter</button>` : '—'}</td>
    </tr>`;
  }).join('');

  main.innerHTML = `
    <div class="page-head"><h2>Bookings Log</h2><p>Complete record of vehicles requisitioned from the Protocol Fleet.</p></div>
    <div class="table-wrap">
      <table>
        <thead><tr><th>Letter No.</th><th>Department</th><th>Vehicle</th><th>Driver</th><th>Dates</th><th>Days</th><th>Category</th><th>Amount</th><th></th></tr></thead>
        <tbody>${rows || `<tr><td colspan="9" class="empty">No bookings recorded yet.</td></tr>`}</tbody>
      </table>
    </div>
  `;
}
function reopenLetter(id){
  const bk = DB.bookings.find(b=>b.id===id);
  if(!bk) return;
  if(bk.category!=='hire' || !bk.letterNo){
    alert('This booking was made on a guest basis — no forwarding letter was generated for it.');
    return;
  }
  openLetterGroup(bk.groupId || bk.id);
}

/* ---------------------------------------------------------------
   Fleet & Drivers
--------------------------------------------------------------- */
let editVehicleId = null;
let editDriverId = null;

function renderFleet(main){
  main.innerHTML = `
    <div class="page-head"><h2>Fleet &amp; Drivers</h2><p>Vehicles and drivers currently on the Protocol Fleet strength.</p></div>
    <div class="grid2">
      <div>
        <div class="table-wrap">
          <table>
            <thead><tr><th>Reg. No.</th><th>Model</th><th>Type</th><th>Usual Driver</th><th>Status</th><th></th></tr></thead>
            <tbody>
              ${DB.vehicles.map(v=>{
                if(v.id===editVehicleId){
                  return `<tr>
                    <td><input class="mono" id="ev_reg" value="${v.regNo}" style="width:100%;padding:4px 6px;border:1px solid var(--line)"></td>
                    <td><input id="ev_model" value="${v.model}" style="width:100%;padding:4px 6px;border:1px solid var(--line)"></td>
                    <td><input id="ev_type" value="${v.type}" style="width:100%;padding:4px 6px;border:1px solid var(--line)"></td>
                    <td><select id="ev_driver" style="width:100%;padding:4px 6px;border:1px solid var(--line)">
                      <option value="">— Unassigned —</option>
                      ${DB.drivers.map(d=>`<option value="${d.id}" ${d.id===v.driverId?'selected':''}>${d.name}</option>`).join('')}
                    </select></td>
                    <td colspan="2" style="white-space:nowrap;">
                      <button class="btn small" onclick="saveEditVehicle('${v.id}')">Save</button>
                      <button class="btn small ghost" onclick="editVehicleId=null;renderFleet(document.getElementById('main'))">Cancel</button>
                    </td>
                  </tr>`;
                }
                const drv = DB.drivers.find(d=>d.id===v.driverId);
                return `<tr>
                <td class="mono">${v.regNo}</td><td>${v.model}</td><td>${v.type}</td>
                <td>${drv ? drv.name : '—'}</td>
                <td>${isOnDutyToday(v.id) ? '<span class="badge busy">On Duty</span>' : '<span class="badge free">Available</span>'}</td>
                <td style="white-space:nowrap;">
                  <button class="btn small ghost" onclick="editVehicleId='${v.id}';editDriverId=null;renderFleet(document.getElementById('main'))">Edit</button>
                  <button class="btn small ghost" onclick="deleteVehicle('${v.id}')">Delete</button>
                </td>
              </tr>`;}).join('')}
            </tbody>
          </table>
        </div>
        <div class="panel">
          <h3>Add Vehicle</h3>
          <div class="grid2">
            <div class="field"><label>Registration No.</label><input id="nv_reg" placeholder="SK-01-A-0000"></div>
            <div class="field"><label>Type</label><input id="nv_type" placeholder="SUV / MPV / Sedan"></div>
          </div>
          <div class="field"><label>Model</label><input id="nv_model" placeholder="e.g. Toyota Innova Crysta"></div>
          <div class="field"><label>Usual Driver</label>
            <select id="nv_driver">
              <option value="">— Unassigned —</option>
              ${DB.drivers.map(d=>`<option value="${d.id}">${d.name}</option>`).join('')}
            </select>
          </div>
          <button class="btn small" id="addVehicleBtn">Add to Fleet</button>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div>
        <div class="table-wrap">
          <table>
            <thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Contact No.</th><th></th></tr></thead>
            <tbody>
              ${DB.drivers.map(d=>{
                if(d.id===editDriverId){
                  return `<tr>
                    <td><input id="ed_name" value="${d.name}" style="width:100%;padding:4px 6px;border:1px solid var(--line)"></td>
                    <td><input id="ed_phone" value="${d.phone}" style="width:100%;padding:4px 6px;border:1px solid var(--line)"></td>
                    <td style="white-space:nowrap;">
                      <button class="btn small" onclick="saveEditDriver('${d.id}')">Save</button>
                      <button class="btn small ghost" onclick="editDriverId=null;renderFleet(document.getElementById('main'))">Cancel</button>
                    </td>
                  </tr>`;
                }
                return `<tr>
                  <td>${d.name}</td><td class="mono">${d.phone}</td>
                  <td style="white-space:nowrap;">
                    <button class="btn small ghost" onclick="editDriverId='${d.id}';editVehicleId=null;renderFleet(document.getElementById('main'))">Edit</button>
                    <button class="btn small ghost" onclick="deleteDriver('${d.id}')">Delete</button>
                  </td>
                </tr>`;
              }).join('')}
            </tbody>
          </table>
        </div>
        <div class="panel">
          <h3>Add Driver</h3>
          <div class="field"><label>Name</label><input id="nd_name" placeholder="e.g. S. Rai"></div>
          <div class="field"><label>Contact No.</label><input id="nd_phone" placeholder="98000 00000"></div>
          <button class="btn small" id="addDriverBtn">Add Driver</button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  `;
  document.getElementById('addVehicleBtn').addEventListener('click', async ()=>{
    const regNo = document.getElementById('nv_reg').value.trim();
    const model = document.getElementById('nv_model').value.trim();
    const type = document.getElementById('nv_type').value.trim();
    const driverId = document.getElementById('nv_driver').value;
    if(!regNo || !model) return alert('Registration number and model are required.');
    DB.vehicles.push({id:uid(), regNo, model, type: type || '—', driverId: driverId || null});
    await saveDB(DB);
    renderFleet(main);
  });
  document.getElementById('addDriverBtn').addEventListener('click', async ()=>{
    const name = document.getElementById('nd_name').value.trim();
    const phone = document.getElementById('nd_phone').value.trim();
    if(!name) return alert('Driver name is required.');
    DB.drivers.push({id:uid(), name, phone: phone || '—'});
    await saveDB(DB);
    renderFleet(main);
  });
}

async function saveEditVehicle(id){
  const regNo = document.getElementById('ev_reg').value.trim();
  const model = document.getElementById('ev_model').value.trim();
  const type = document.getElementById('ev_type').value.trim();
  const driverId = document.getElementById('ev_driver').value;
  if(!regNo || !model) return alert('Registration number and model are required.');
  const v = DB.vehicles.find(x=>x.id===id);
  Object.assign(v, { regNo, model, type: type || '—', driverId: driverId || null });
  await saveDB(DB);
  editVehicleId = null;
  renderFleet(document.getElementById('main'));
}
async function deleteVehicle(id){
  const used = DB.bookings.some(b=>b.vehicleId===id);
  const msg = used
    ? 'This vehicle appears in existing bookings — those records will keep showing "—" for the vehicle once removed. Delete anyway?'
    : 'Remove this vehicle from the fleet?';
  if(!confirm(msg)) return;
  DB.vehicles = DB.vehicles.filter(v=>v.id!==id);
  await saveDB(DB);
  renderFleet(document.getElementById('main'));
}
async function saveEditDriver(id){
  const name = document.getElementById('ed_name').value.trim();
  const phone = document.getElementById('ed_phone').value.trim();
  if(!name) return alert('Driver name is required.');
  const d = DB.drivers.find(x=>x.id===id);
  Object.assign(d, { name, phone: phone || '—' });
  await saveDB(DB);
  editDriverId = null;
  renderFleet(document.getElementById('main'));
}
async function deleteDriver(id){
  const used = DB.bookings.some(b=>b.driverId===id) || DB.vehicles.some(v=>v.driverId===id);
  const msg = used
    ? 'This driver is linked to existing vehicles or bookings — those references will show "—" once removed. Delete anyway?'
    : 'Remove this driver from the roster?';
  if(!confirm(msg)) return;
  DB.drivers = DB.drivers.filter(d=>d.id!==id);
  DB.vehicles.forEach(v=>{ if(v.driverId===id) v.driverId = null; });
  await saveDB(DB);
  renderFleet(document.getElementById('main'));
}

/* ---------------------------------------------------------------
   Reports
--------------------------------------------------------------- */
function buildReportStats(){
  const revenue = DB.bookings.filter(b=>b.category==='hire').reduce((s,b)=>s+b.amount,0);
  const vStats = DB.vehicles.map(v=>{
    const bks = DB.bookings.filter(b=>b.vehicleId===v.id);
    return { v, count: bks.length, days: bks.reduce((s,b)=>s+b.days,0), revenue: bks.filter(b=>b.category==='hire').reduce((s,b)=>s+b.amount,0) };
  }).sort((a,b)=>b.days-a.days);
  const dStats = DB.drivers.map(d=>{
    const bks = DB.bookings.filter(b=>b.driverId===d.id);
    return { d, count: bks.length, days: bks.reduce((s,b)=>s+b.days,0) };
  }).sort((a,b)=>b.days-a.days);
  return { revenue, vStats, dStats,
    totalBookings: DB.bookings.length,
    hireCount: DB.bookings.filter(b=>b.category==='hire').length,
    guestCount: DB.bookings.filter(b=>b.category!=='hire').length,
    vehicleDays: DB.bookings.reduce((s,b)=>s+b.days,0)
  };
}

function renderReports(main){
  const s = buildReportStats();
  main.innerHTML = `
    <div class="page-head">
      <h2>Reports</h2>
      <p>Revenue and utilisation summary for the Protocol Fleet.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="cards">
      <div class="card"><div class="eyebrow">Total Revenue</div><div class="val">${inr(s.revenue)}</div><div class="sub">${s.hireCount} hire booking(s)</div></div>
      <div class="card"><div class="eyebrow">Guest Bookings</div><div class="val">${s.guestCount}</div><div class="sub">no charge levied</div></div>
      <div class="card"><div class="eyebrow">Vehicle-Days</div><div class="val">${s.vehicleDays}</div><div class="sub">across ${s.totalBookings} booking(s)</div></div>
      <div class="card"><div class="eyebrow">Fleet Strength</div><div class="val">${DB.vehicles.length}</div><div class="sub">${DB.drivers.length} drivers on roll</div></div>
    </div>

    <div class="table-wrap">
      <table>
        <thead><tr><th>Vehicle</th><th>Model</th><th>Bookings</th><th>Days Deployed</th><th>Revenue</th></tr></thead>
        <tbody>${s.vStats.map(x=>`<tr><td class="mono">${x.v.regNo}</td><td>${x.v.model}</td><td>${x.count}</td><td>${x.days}</td><td>${inr(x.revenue)}</td></tr>`).join('') || `<tr><td colspan="5" class="empty">No data yet.</td></tr>`}</tbody>
      </table>
    </div>

    <div class="table-wrap">
      <table>
        <thead><tr><th>Driver</th><th>Bookings</th><th>Days Deployed</th></tr></thead>
        <tbody>${s.dStats.map(x=>`<tr><td>${x.d.name}</td><td>${x.count}</td><td>${x.days}</td></tr>`).join('') || `<tr><td colspan="3" class="empty">No data yet.</td></tr>`}</tbody>
      </table>
    </div>

    <button class="btn" id="overallReportBtn">Generate Overall Report</button>

    <div class="panel" style="margin-top:24px;">
      <h3>Data &amp; Portability</h3>
      <p style="color:var(--ink-soft);font-size:12.5px;margin:-4px 0 14px;">Download a backup of every vehicle, driver and booking record. Use this to carry your data to another computer, or to restore it if needed.</p>
      <div style="display:flex;gap:10px;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:center;">
        <button class="btn small" id="exportBackupBtn">Download Backup (.json)</button>
        <label class="btn small ghost" style="cursor:pointer;">
          Restore from Backup
          <input type="file" id="importBackupInput" accept="application/json" style="display:none;">
        </label>
      </div>
    </div>
  `;
  document.getElementById('overallReportBtn').addEventListener('click', ()=>openOverallReport(s));
  document.getElementById('exportBackupBtn').addEventListener('click', exportBackup);
  document.getElementById('importBackupInput').addEventListener('change', handleImportFile);
}

function exportBackup(){
  const blob = new Blob([JSON.stringify(DB, null, 2)], {type:'application/json'});
  const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
  const a = document.createElement('a');
  a.href = url;
  a.download = `protocol-fleet-backup-${todayISO()}.json`;
  document.body.appendChild(a); a.click(); a.remove();
  setTimeout(()=>URL.revokeObjectURL(url), 4000);
}

function handleImportFile(e){
  const file = e.target.files[0];
  if(!file) return;
  const reader = new FileReader();
  reader.onload = async ()=>{
    let parsed;
    try{ parsed = JSON.parse(reader.result); }
    catch(err){ alert('That file is not a valid backup (could not be read as JSON).'); return; }
    if(!Array.isArray(parsed.vehicles) || !Array.isArray(parsed.drivers) || !Array.isArray(parsed.bookings)){
      alert('That file does not look like a Protocol Fleet backup.');
      return;
    }
    if(!confirm(`This will replace all current data on this computer with the backup (${parsed.vehicles.length} vehicles, ${parsed.drivers.length} drivers, ${parsed.bookings.length} bookings). Continue?`)) return;
    parsed.fleetVersion = FLEET_VERSION;
    DB = parsed;
    await saveDB(DB);
    render('dashboard');
    document.querySelectorAll('#nav button').forEach(b=>b.classList.toggle('active', b.dataset.view==='dashboard'));
  };
  reader.readAsText(file);
  e.target.value = '';
}

function openOverallReport(s){
  document.getElementById('modalLabel').textContent = 'Overall Report';
  document.getElementById('printable').innerHTML = `
    <div class="report-doc" id="reportRoot">
      <div class="eyebrow">Government of Sikkim · Home Department · Mechanical Section</div>
      <h3>Protocol Fleet — Overall Report</h3>
      <div class="sub">Generated on ${fmtDate(todayISO())}</div>
      <div class="lh-facts" style="margin-bottom:20px">
        <div><span>Total Bookings</span><span>${s.totalBookings}</span></div>
        <div><span>Hire Bookings</span><span>${s.hireCount}</span></div>
        <div><span>Guest Bookings</span><span>${s.guestCount}</span></div>
        <div><span>Total Revenue</span><span>${inr(s.revenue)}</span></div>
        <div><span>Total Vehicle-Days</span><span>${s.vehicleDays}</span></div>
        <div><span>Fleet Strength</span><span>${DB.vehicles.length} vehicles / ${DB.drivers.length} drivers</span></div>
      </div>
      <h3 style="font-size:13px;margin-bottom:8px">Vehicle-wise Utilisation</h3>
      <table style="margin-bottom:20px">
        <thead><tr><th>Vehicle</th><th>Bookings</th><th>Days</th><th>Revenue</th></tr></thead>
        <tbody>${s.vStats.map(x=>`<tr><td>${x.v.regNo} — ${x.v.model}</td><td>${x.count}</td><td>${x.days}</td><td>${inr(x.revenue)}</td></tr>`).join('')}</tbody>
      </table>
      <h3 style="font-size:13px;margin-bottom:8px">Driver-wise Utilisation</h3>
      <table>
        <thead><tr><th>Driver</th><th>Bookings</th><th>Days</th></tr></thead>
        <tbody>${s.dStats.map(x=>`<tr><td>${x.d.name}</td><td>${x.count}</td><td>${x.days}</td></tr>`).join('')}</tbody>
      </table>
    </div>
  `;
  document.getElementById('modalBack').classList.remove('hidden');
}

/* ---------------------------------------------------------------
   Lazy library loading — JSZip and pdf-lib are only fetched
   when a download is actually requested, with a hard timeout,
   so a slow or unreachable CDN can never freeze the rest of
   the app (dashboard, bookings, calendar all work with zero
   external dependencies).
--------------------------------------------------------------- */
const LIB_URLS = {
  JSZip: 'https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/jszip/3.10.1/jszip.min.js',
  PDFLib: 'https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/pdf-lib/1.17.1/pdf-lib.min.js'
};
const libLoadPromises = {};
function loadLibrary(globalName, timeoutMs=15000){
  if(window[globalName]) return Promise.resolve();
  if(libLoadPromises[globalName]) return libLoadPromises[globalName];
  libLoadPromises[globalName] = new Promise((resolve, reject)=>{
    const timer = setTimeout(()=>{
      reject(new Error(`Timed out loading ${globalName}. Check your internet connection and try again.`));
    }, timeoutMs);
    const script = document.createElement('script');
    script.src = LIB_URLS[globalName];
    script.onload = ()=>{ clearTimeout(timer); resolve(); };
    script.onerror = ()=>{
      clearTimeout(timer);
      delete libLoadPromises[globalName];
      reject(new Error(`Could not load a required library (${globalName}). Check your internet connection and try again.`));
    };
    document.head.appendChild(script);
  });
  return libLoadPromises[globalName];
}

/* ---------------------------------------------------------------
   Word document generation — fills the exact departmental
   letterhead template (from hire_charges.docx) in-browser
--------------------------------------------------------------- */
function base64ToUint8Array(b64){
  const bin = atob(b64);
  const bytes = new Uint8Array(bin.length);
  for(let i=0;i<bin.length;i++) bytes[i] = bin.charCodeAt(i);
  return bytes;
}

async function buildLetterDocxBlob(groupId){
  const items = DB.bookings.filter(b => (b.groupId || b.id) === groupId);
  if(!items.length) return null;
  const bk = items[0];
  const multi = items.length > 1;
  const totalAmount = items.reduce((s,x)=>s+x.amount,0);
  const period = `${fmtShort(bk.dateFrom)} to ${fmtShort(bk.dateTo)}`;

  const firstV = DB.vehicles.find(x=>x.id===bk.vehicleId);
  const vehiclePhrase = multi
    ? `${numberToWordsIndian(items.length).toLowerCase()} (${items.length}) vehicles noted below`
    : (firstV ? `one (1) vehicle bearing registration no. ${firstV.regNo}, ${firstV.model}` : 'one (1) vehicle');

  const zip = await JSZip.loadAsync(base64ToUint8Array(TEMPLATE_DOCX_B64));
  let xml = await zip.file('word/document.xml').async('string');

  // Build the repeated table rows from the single templated row
  const rowMatch = xml.match(/<!--ROWSTART-->([\s\S]*?)<!--ROWEND-->/);
  const rowTemplate = rowMatch[1];
  const rowsXml = items.map((it,i)=>{
    const v = DB.vehicles.find(x=>x.id===it.vehicleId);
    return rowTemplate
      .replace('__SLNO__', i+1)
      .replace('__VEHNO__', escapeXml(v ? `${v.regNo}, ${v.model}` : '—'))
      .replace('__PERIOD__', escapeXml(period))
      .replace('__RATE__', escapeXml(inr(RATE)))
      .replace('__AMOUNT__', escapeXml(inr(it.amount)));
  }).join('');
  xml = xml.replace(/<!--ROWSTART-->[\s\S]*?<!--ROWEND-->/, rowsXml);

  const replacements = {
    '__LETTERNO__': bk.letterNo,
    '__DATE__': fmtDate(bk.createdAt.slice(0,10)),
    '__OFFICER__': bk.officer,
    '__DEPARTMENT__': bk.department,
    '__VS__': multi ? 's' : '',
    '__DS__': bk.days>1 ? 's' : '',
    '__REFNO__': bk.refNo || '__________',
    '__REFDATE__': bk.refDate ? fmtShort(bk.refDate) : '__________',
    '__VEHICLE_PHRASE__': vehiclePhrase,
    '__IS_ARE__': multi ? 'are' : 'is',
    '__PURPOSE__': bk.purpose,
    '__FROM__': fmtShort(bk.dateFrom),
    '__TO__': fmtShort(bk.dateTo),
    '__DAYS__': String(bk.days),
    '__TOTAL__': totalAmount.toLocaleString('en-IN'),
    '__TOTALINR__': inr(totalAmount),
    '__WORDS__': inrWords(totalAmount)
  };
  Object.entries(replacements).forEach(([token, val])=>{
    xml = xml.split(token).join(escapeXml(val));
  });

  zip.file('word/document.xml', xml);
  return await zip.generateAsync({
    type:'blob',
    mimeType:'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document',
    compression:'DEFLATE',
    compressionOptions:{ level:6 }
  });
}

async function downloadLetterDocx(groupId){
  const btn = document.getElementById('downloadDocxBtn');
  const original = btn.textContent;
  btn.disabled = true;
  try{
    btn.textContent = 'Loading library…';
    await loadLibrary('JSZip');
    btn.textContent = 'Preparing…';
    const blob = await buildLetterDocxBlob(groupId);
    const bk = DB.bookings.find(b => (b.groupId||b.id)===groupId);
    const filename = `Hire Charge Letter - ${(bk.letterNo||'draft').replace(/\//g,'-')}.docx`;
    const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
    const a = document.createElement('a');
    a.href = url; a.download = filename;
    document.body.appendChild(a); a.click(); a.remove();
    setTimeout(()=>URL.revokeObjectURL(url), 4000);
  }catch(e){
    console.error(e);
    alert(e.message || 'Could not generate the Word document. Please try again.');
  }finally{
    btn.textContent = original;
    btn.disabled = false;
  }
}

/* ---------------------------------------------------------------
   PDF generation — hand-built replica of the exact letterhead
   layout (logos, boxed reference line, table) using pdf-lib,
   since Word's own rendering engine isn't available in-browser.
--------------------------------------------------------------- */
function pdfWrapWords(text, font, size, maxWidth){
  const words = text.split(/\s+/);
  const lines = [];
  let cur = [];
  for(const w of words){
    const test = [...cur, w].join(' ');
    if(font.widthOfTextAtSize(test, size) > maxWidth && cur.length){
      lines.push(cur); cur = [w];
    } else cur.push(w);
  }
  if(cur.length) lines.push(cur);
  return lines;
}
function pdfDrawParagraph(page, text, {x, y, maxWidth, font, size, lineHeight, justify=true}){
  const { rgb } = PDFLib;
  const lines = pdfWrapWords(text, font, size, maxWidth);
  lines.forEach((words, idx)=>{
    const isLast = idx === lines.length-1;
    const lineText = words.join(' ');
    if(justify && !isLast && words.length>1){
      const natural = font.widthOfTextAtSize(lineText, size);
      const spaceW = font.widthOfTextAtSize(' ', size);
      const extra = (maxWidth - natural) / (words.length-1);
      let cx = x;
      words.forEach(w=>{
        page.drawText(w, {x:cx, y, size, font, color:rgb(0,0,0)});
        cx += font.widthOfTextAtSize(w, size) + spaceW + extra;
      });
    } else {
      page.drawText(lineText, {x, y, size, font, color:rgb(0,0,0)});
    }
    y -= lineHeight;
  });
  return y;
}
function pdfParagraphHeight(text, font, size, maxWidth, lineHeight){
  return pdfWrapWords(text, font, size, maxWidth).length * lineHeight;
}

async function buildLetterPdfBlob(groupId){
  const { PDFDocument, StandardFonts, rgb } = PDFLib;
  const items = DB.bookings.filter(b => (b.groupId || b.id) === groupId);
  if(!items.length) return null;
  const bk = items[0];
  const multi = items.length > 1;
  const totalAmount = items.reduce((s,x)=>s+x.amount,0);
  const period = `${fmtShort(bk.dateFrom)} to ${fmtShort(bk.dateTo)}`;
  const firstV = DB.vehicles.find(x=>x.id===bk.vehicleId);
  const vehiclePhrase = multi
    ? `${numberToWordsIndian(items.length).toLowerCase()} (${items.length}) vehicles noted below`
    : (firstV ? `one (1) vehicle bearing registration no. ${firstV.regNo}, ${firstV.model}` : 'one (1) vehicle');

  const PT = 72, PAGE_W = 8.5*PT, PAGE_H = 14*PT;
  const ML = 68, MR = 68, MB = 60;
  const CW = PAGE_W - ML - MR;

  const pdfDoc = await PDFDocument.create();
  const timesRoman = await pdfDoc.embedFont(StandardFonts.TimesRoman);
  const timesBold = await pdfDoc.embedFont(StandardFonts.TimesRomanBold);
  const emblemImg = await pdfDoc.embedPng(base64ToUint8Array(EMBLEM_PNG_B64));
  const sealImg = await pdfDoc.embedPng(base64ToUint8Array(SEAL_PNG_B64));

  function drawHeader(page){
    const ew = 62, eh = ew*(emblemImg.height/emblemImg.width);
    page.drawImage(emblemImg, {x:(PAGE_W-ew)/2, y:PAGE_H-98, width:ew, height:eh});
    const sw = 58, sh = sw*(sealImg.height/sealImg.width);
    page.drawImage(sealImg, {x:PAGE_W-MR-sw, y:PAGE_H-92, width:sw, height:sh});
    const headLines = ['GOVERNMENT OF SIKKIM','HOME DEPARTMENT','TASHILING SECRETARIAT','GANGTOK'];
    let hy = PAGE_H - 40;
    headLines.forEach(line=>{
      const w = timesBold.widthOfTextAtSize(line, 13);
      page.drawText(line, {x:(PAGE_W-w)/2, y:hy, size:13, font:timesBold, color:rgb(0,0,0)});
      hy -= 15;
    });
    const ruleY = PAGE_H - 108;
    page.drawLine({start:{x:ML-8,y:ruleY}, end:{x:PAGE_W-MR+8,y:ruleY}, thickness:1.4, color:rgb(0,0,0)});
    page.drawLine({start:{x:ML-8,y:ruleY-4}, end:{x:PAGE_W-MR+8,y:ruleY-4}, thickness:0.75, color:rgb(0,0,0)});
  }

  let page = pdfDoc.addPage([PAGE_W, PAGE_H]);
  drawHeader(page);
  let y = PAGE_H - 128;
  const LH = 15;

  function ensureSpace(needed){
    if(y - needed < MB){
      page = pdfDoc.addPage([PAGE_W, PAGE_H]);
      drawHeader(page);
      y = PAGE_H - 128;
    }
  }

  // No / Date box
  const boxH = 20;
  page.drawRectangle({x:ML, y:y-boxH+6, width:CW, height:boxH, borderWidth:1, borderColor:rgb(0,0,0)});
  page.drawText(`No: ${bk.letterNo}`, {x:ML+8, y:y-boxH+12, size:12, font:timesBold});
  const datedText = `Dated: ${fmtDate(bk.createdAt.slice(0,10))}`;
  page.drawText(datedText, {x:PAGE_W-MR-8-timesBold.widthOfTextAtSize(datedText,12), y:y-boxH+12, size:12, font:timesBold});
  y -= boxH + 22;

  page.drawText('To,', {x:ML, y, size:12, font:timesRoman}); y -= LH;
  y = pdfDrawParagraph(page, `${bk.officer},`, {x:ML, y, maxWidth:CW, font:timesRoman, size:12, lineHeight:LH, justify:false});
  y = pdfDrawParagraph(page, `${bk.department}.`, {x:ML, y, maxWidth:CW, font:timesRoman, size:12, lineHeight:LH, justify:false});
  y -= 8;

  page.drawText(`Sub: Hire Charge of Protocol Fleet Vehicle${multi?'s':''}: reg.`, {x:ML, y, size:12, font:timesBold});
  y -= LH + 6;
  page.drawText('Sir/Madam,', {x:ML, y, size:12, font:timesRoman});
  y -= LH + 6;

  const intro = `With reference to your letter no. ${bk.refNo||'__________'} dated ${bk.refDate?fmtShort(bk.refDate):'__________'}, `+
    `I am directed to inform you that ${vehiclePhrase} of the Home Department ${multi?'are':'is'} being detailed for the duty of `+
    `${bk.purpose} w.e.f. ${fmtShort(bk.dateFrom)} to ${fmtShort(bk.dateTo)} (${bk.days} day${bk.days>1?'s':''}). The detail is as under:-`;
  ensureSpace(pdfParagraphHeight(intro, timesRoman, 12, CW, LH));
  y = pdfDrawParagraph(page, intro, {x:ML, y, maxWidth:CW, font:timesRoman, size:12, lineHeight:LH});
  y -= 10;

  // Table
  const colW = [40, 140, 150, 75, CW-40-140-150-75];
  const colX = [ML]; colW.forEach((w,i)=>{ if(i>0) colX.push(colX[i-1]+colW[i-1]); });
  const rowH = 22;
  function drawRow(cells, bold){
    ensureSpace(rowH);
    page.drawRectangle({x:ML, y:y-rowH, width:CW, height:rowH, borderWidth:0.75, borderColor:rgb(0,0,0)});
    colX.forEach((cx,i)=>{ if(i>0) page.drawLine({start:{x:cx,y:y},end:{x:cx,y:y-rowH}, thickness:0.75, color:rgb(0,0,0)}); });
    cells.forEach((c,i)=>{
      const f = bold ? timesBold : timesRoman;
      const text = String(c);
      const truncated = f.widthOfTextAtSize(text, 10) > colW[i]-8;
      page.drawText(truncated ? text.slice(0, Math.floor(text.length*(colW[i]-8)/f.widthOfTextAtSize(text,10))) : text,
        {x:colX[i]+4, y:y-14, size:10, font:f});
    });
    y -= rowH;
  }
  drawRow(['Sl.No','Vehicle No','Period of Hiring','Rate/day','Amount'], true);
  items.forEach((it,i)=>{
    const v = DB.vehicles.find(x=>x.id===it.vehicleId);
    drawRow([i+1, v?`${v.regNo}, ${v.model}`:'—', period, rsPlain(RATE), rsPlain(it.amount)], false);
  });
  ensureSpace(rowH);
  page.drawRectangle({x:ML, y:y-rowH, width:CW, height:rowH, borderWidth:0.75, borderColor:rgb(0,0,0)});
  page.drawLine({start:{x:colX[4],y:y},end:{x:colX[4],y:y-rowH}, thickness:0.75, color:rgb(0,0,0)});
  const totalLbl = 'Total';
  page.drawText(totalLbl, {x:colX[4]-4-timesBold.widthOfTextAtSize(totalLbl,10), y:y-14, size:10, font:timesBold});
  page.drawText(rsPlain(totalAmount), {x:colX[4]+4, y:y-14, size:10, font:timesBold});
  y -= rowH + 16;

  const closing = `Hence, I am directed to request you to settle the hire charge of the vehicle${multi?'s':''} amounting to `+
    `${rsPlain(totalAmount)}/- (Rupees ${inrWords(totalAmount)}) only vide Challan No. __________ (to be left blank) `+
    `enclosed with this letter. On payment the same shall be forwarded to your Office for record.`;
  ensureSpace(pdfParagraphHeight(closing, timesRoman, 12, CW, LH));
  y = pdfDrawParagraph(page, closing, {x:ML, y, maxWidth:CW, font:timesRoman, size:12, lineHeight:LH});
  y -= 10;

  ensureSpace(LH*7);
  page.drawText('Encl: As Stated Above.', {x:ML, y, size:12, font:timesRoman}); y -= LH + 20;
  page.drawText('Yours faithfully,', {x:ML, y, size:12, font:timesRoman}); y -= LH*3;
  page.drawText('Joint Secretary (Protocol)', {x:ML, y, size:12, font:timesBold});

  const bytes = await pdfDoc.save();
  return new Blob([bytes], {type:'application/pdf'});
}

async function downloadLetterPdf(groupId){
  const btn = document.getElementById('downloadPdfBtn');
  const original = btn.textContent;
  btn.disabled = true;
  try{
    btn.textContent = 'Loading library…';
    await loadLibrary('PDFLib');
    btn.textContent = 'Preparing…';
    const blob = await buildLetterPdfBlob(groupId);
    const bk = DB.bookings.find(b => (b.groupId||b.id)===groupId);
    const filename = `Hire Charge Letter - ${(bk.letterNo||'draft').replace(/\//g,'-')}.pdf`;
    const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
    const a = document.createElement('a');
    a.href = url; a.download = filename;
    document.body.appendChild(a); a.click(); a.remove();
    setTimeout(()=>URL.revokeObjectURL(url), 4000);
  }catch(e){
    console.error(e);
    alert(e.message || 'Could not generate the PDF. Please try again.');
  }finally{
    btn.textContent = original;
    btn.disabled = false;
  }
}

/* ---------------------------------------------------------------
   Letter generation — follows the Home Department's
   "Hire Charge of Protocol Fleet Vehicle" format
--------------------------------------------------------------- */
function openLetterGroup(groupId){
  try{
    openLetterGroupInner(groupId);
  }catch(e){
    console.error(e);
    document.getElementById('modalLabel').textContent = 'Letter';
    document.getElementById('printable').innerHTML = `<div style="padding:40px;text-align:center;color:var(--ink-soft);">
      Something went wrong preparing this preview. You can close this and try again — your booking data is unaffected.
    </div>`;
    document.getElementById('modalBack').classList.remove('hidden');
  }
}

function openLetterGroupInner(groupId){
  const items = DB.bookings.filter(b => (b.groupId || b.id) === groupId);
  if(!items.length) return;
  const bk = items[0];
  const multi = items.length > 1;
  const totalAmount = items.reduce((s,x)=>s+x.amount,0);
  const period = `${fmtShort(bk.dateFrom)} to ${fmtShort(bk.dateTo)}`;

  const tableRows = items.map((it,i)=>{
    const v = DB.vehicles.find(x=>x.id===it.vehicleId);
    return `<tr>
      <td>${i+1}</td>
      <td>${v ? v.regNo : '—'}${v ? ', '+v.model : ''}</td>
      <td>${period}</td>
      <td>${inr(RATE)}</td>
      <td>${inr(it.amount)}</td>
    </tr>`;
  }).join('');

  const firstV = DB.vehicles.find(x=>x.id===bk.vehicleId);
  const singleLine = firstV
    ? `one (1) vehicle bearing registration no. ${firstV.regNo}, ${firstV.model}`
    : 'one (1) vehicle';
  const multiLine = `${numberToWordsIndian(items.length).toLowerCase()} (${items.length}) vehicles noted below`;

  document.getElementById('modalLabel').textContent = `Letter ${bk.letterNo}`;
  document.getElementById('printable').innerHTML = `
    <div style="background:var(--accent-soft);color:var(--accent);font-size:11.5px;padding:8px 22px;text-align:center;">
      Content preview — the downloaded Word and PDF files carry the Home Department's actual letterhead.
    </div>
    <div class="letterhead">
      <div style="text-align:center;border-bottom:2px solid var(--ink);padding-bottom:14px;margin-bottom:18px;">
        <svg width="40" height="40" viewBox="0 0 26 26" style="margin-bottom:6px;"><circle cx="13" cy="13" r="12" fill="none" stroke="#1C2B39" stroke-width="1"/><circle cx="13" cy="13" r="8.5" fill="none" stroke="#1C2B39" stroke-width="1"/><text x="13" y="16.5" text-anchor="middle" font-family="IBM Plex Mono" font-size="7" fill="#1C2B39">GoS</text></svg>
        <div style="font-family:'Source Serif 4',serif;font-weight:700;font-size:16px;letter-spacing:.02em;">GOVERNMENT OF SIKKIM</div>
        <div style="font-family:'Source Serif 4',serif;font-weight:700;font-size:14px;">HOME DEPARTMENT</div>
        <div style="font-size:12px;color:var(--ink-soft);margin-top:2px;">TASHILING SECRETARIAT, GANGTOK</div>
      </div>
      <div style="border:1px solid var(--ink);padding:6px 12px;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:12px;margin-bottom:20px;">
        <span>No: ${bk.letterNo}</span>
        <span>Dated: ${fmtDate(bk.createdAt.slice(0,10))}</span>
      </div>
      <div class="lh-body">
        <p>To,<br>${bk.officer},<br>${bk.department}.</p>
        <p><strong>Sub: Hire Charge of Protocol Fleet Vehicle${multi?'s':''}: reg.</strong></p>
        <p>Sir/Madam,</p>
        <p>With reference to your letter no. ${bk.refNo || '__________'} dated ${bk.refDate ? fmtShort(bk.refDate) : '__________'}, I am directed to inform you that ${multi ? multiLine : singleLine} of the Home Department ${multi?'are':'is'} being detailed for the duty of ${bk.purpose} w.e.f. ${fmtShort(bk.dateFrom)} to ${fmtShort(bk.dateTo)} (${bk.days} day${bk.days>1?'s':''}). The detail is as under:-</p>
        <table style="margin:14px 0">
          <thead><tr><th>Sl.No</th><th>Vehicle No.</th><th>Period of Hiring</th><th>Rate per day</th><th>Amount</th></tr></thead>
          <tbody>
            ${tableRows}
            <tr><td colspan="4" style="text-align:right;font-weight:600;">Total</td><td style="font-weight:600;">${inr(totalAmount)}</td></tr>
          </tbody>
        </table>
        <p>Hence, I am directed to request you to settle the hire charge of the vehicle${multi?'s':''} amounting to Rs. ${totalAmount.toLocaleString('en-IN')}/- (Rupees ${inrWords(totalAmount)}) only vide Challan No. __________ (to be left blank) enclosed with this letter. On payment the same shall be forwarded to your Office for record.</p>
        <p>Encl: As Stated Above.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="lh-sign">
        Yours faithfully,
        <div class="line">
          Joint Secretary (Protocol)
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  `;
  document.getElementById('modalBack').classList.remove('hidden');
  document.getElementById('downloadDocxBtn').onclick = () => downloadLetterDocx(groupId);
  document.getElementById('downloadPdfBtn').onclick = () => downloadLetterPdf(groupId);
}
function closeModal(){ document.getElementById('modalBack').classList.add('hidden'); }
document.getElementById('modalBack').addEventListener('click', e=>{ if(e.target.id==='modalBack') closeModal(); });
document.addEventListener('keydown', e=>{ if(e.key==='Escape') closeModal(); });

/* ---------------------------------------------------------------
   Boot
--------------------------------------------------------------- */
(async function boot(){
  document.getElementById('main').innerHTML = `<div class="empty">Loading fleet register…</div>`;
  DB = await loadDB();
  render('dashboard');
})();
</script>
</body>
</html>
